sentences.arabic: تَعَبْتُ مِنَ الْفَنَادِقِ الْكَبِيرَةِ وَقَرَّرْتُ أَنْ أَبِيتَ فِي نُزُلٍ صَغِيرٍ اقْتِصَادِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Umorilo me boraviti u velikim hotelima pa sam odlučio prenoćiti u maloj, ekonomičnoj gostionici.
sentences.translationEn: I was tired of large hotels and decided to stay in a small, budget hostel.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْغُرْفَةُ بَسِيطَةً لَكِنَّهَا نَظِيفَةً وَمُرِيحَةً.
sentences.translation: Soba je bila jednostavna, ali čista i ugodna.
sentences.translationEn: The room was simple but clean and comfortable.

sentences.arabic: تَعَرَّفْتُ عَلَى مُسَافِرِينَ آخَرِينَ مِنْ دُوَلٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ فِي صَالَةِ الْجُلُوسِ.
sentences.translation: Upoznao sam druge putnike iz različitih zemalja u zajedničkom salonu.
sentences.translationEn: I met other travellers from different countries in the common room.

sentences.translation: Razmjenjivali smo priče i savjete o putovanjima.
sentences.translationEn: We exchanged stories and travel tips.

sentences.arabic: قُلْتُ فِي نَفْسِي: «السَّفَرُ يَجْمَعُ النَّاسَ مِنْ كُلِّ أَنْحَاءِ الْعَالَمِ.»
sentences.translation: Rekao sam u sebi: "Putovanje spaja ljude iz cijelog svijeta."
sentences.translationEn: I told myself: "Travel brings people together from all over the world."
